title: Implement repo.healthcheck (read-only, 10-point)
description:
- scope: repo
- phase: 1
For each of 10 active points emit {check_id, status, evidence, run_hint}. Parametrized
--check <id|all>. NEVER fixes/scaffolds/runs commands. Declaration-only except #1/#2
file-existence. #3 informational-only (never blocks). #7 optional (never blocks).

title: Write templates/understand-anything-action.yml + .gitattributes snippet
description:
- scope: docs
- phase: 4
Validated default GitHub Action (OpenCode+Zen). pull_request trigger during onboarding,
default-branch conditional in production (github.event.repository.default_branch), bot
commit-back [skip ci]. Plus .gitattributes binary -diff linguist-generated snippet doc.

title: Implement repo.run (executor primitive, 3-min timeout, verify_run polling)
description:
- scope: repo
- phase: 2
Two modes: exit-commands (install/test/test_integration/agent_verify) -> expect exit 0;
serve-commands (dev/run) -> background-start, poll commands.verify_run until pass/timeout,
kill, report. Returns {command, exit_code, stdout_tail, stderr_tail, duration, timed_out,
smoke_passed}. Configurable --timeout (default 180s).

title: Implement repo.understand.verify (#1 test)
description:
- scope: repo
- phase: 2
Asserts: (i) .understand-anything/knowledge-graph.json exists+parses+non-empty; (ii) the
GitHub Action run on the PR completed green; (iii) PR got merged. Harness invokes after the
PR's Action run completes. Credential model: gh/GITHUB_TOKEN from env.

title: Implement repo.fix_loop.prompt (spec emitter)
description:
- scope: repo
- phase: 2
Emits harness-readable markdown spec for 2-subagent fix-loop the harness runs during setup.
For each declared command: runner subagent calls repo.run; on non-zero spawn implementor
subagent to fix repo, report back, re-run; cap N=4; deploy excluded. Spec emitter only.

title: Write workflows/repo-init.md
description:
- scope: docs
- phase: 3
Orchestrate harness through 10-point checklist. Each point: healthcheck entry, remediation
template, when catalog.service.update should be called. Embed per-point remediation templates.

title: Extend service.schema.json with repo-init healthcheck fields
description:
- scope: catalog
- phase: 1
Add: understand_anything.enabled (bool); commands.dev, commands.run, commands.verify_run,
commands.test_integration, commands.deploy, commands.agent_verify (strings); docs type:agent;
deploy skip/reason. Update ServiceCatalog Rust struct + schemas/service.schema.json + template.
Re-validate with `ws ai run catalog.validate --input '{}'`.

title: Implement provider.config.sync_instructions (regenerate AGENTS.md)
description:
- scope: provider
- phase: 3
Regenerate ws-managed company AGENTS.md at workspace root reflecting current workflows/*.md,
current catalog, and company practices. Links workflows/deploy.md. Counterpart to read-only
provider.config.get_instructions.

title: Implement repo.verify (run-all, post-setup, excludes deploy)
description:
- scope: repo
- phase: 2
Deterministic run-all post-setup only. Order: install -> dev(+verify_run) -> test ->
test_integration -> agent_verify. Stops at first failure. Excludes deploy. Aggregate report.
No LLM, no harness.

title: Write workflows/deploy.md
description:
- scope: docs
- phase: 3
Company envs/when/triggers policy (prose, harness-readable). provider.config.sync_instructions
links it from root AGENTS.md.

title: Write workflows/repo-verify.md
description:
- scope: docs
- phase: 3
Express the 2-subagent fix-loop the harness executes during setup (calls repo.run + consumes
repo.fix_loop.prompt). Per-change loop: harness edits code -> test + agent_verify -> on fail
2-subagent fix-loop -> on green PR.

title: Implement catalog.service.update (strict partial-merge)
description:
- scope: catalog
- phase: 1
Partial-merge patch into catalog/services/<id>.yaml. commands is a map -> per-key merge.
Top-level keys (docs, deploy, understand_anything) replace whole value. Strict: reject
unknown keys (fail fast). Re-run catalog.validate.
